center.name: 普納島
center.summary: 普納島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Yellow-bellied elaenia、灰白小霸鹟、Necklaced spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in southwestern Ecuador from central Manabí Province south to western Guayas Province and Puná Island

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: semipagana: extreme southwestern Colombia, Ecuador west of the Andes including Puná Island, Tumbes Department in extreme northwestern Peru, and intermittently through Peru on the east side of the Andes The yellow-bellied elaenia inhabits a variety of habitats

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-and-white tyrannulet has a disjunct distribution It is found in southwestern Ecuador on the Isla de la Plata and Isla Puná, on the mainland in Guayas and Loja provinces, and with a single record in Manabí Province

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in southwestern Ecuador from central Manabí Province south to western Guayas Province and Puná Island

links.evidence: semipagana: extreme southwestern Colombia, Ecuador west of the Andes including Puná Island, Tumbes Department in extreme northwestern Peru, and intermittently through Peru on the east side of the Andes The yellow-bellied elaenia inhabits a variety of habitats
